problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Combining Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
